hero.headline: *Locked out?* We're already on our way
hero.subheadline: Real locksmiths, real trucks, real solutions — serving Springfield around the clock.

services_section.label: WHAT WE UNLOCK
services_section.heading: Every lock, every situation
services_section.subheading: From midnight lockouts to high-security installs

services.title: Emergency Lockouts
services.description: House, car, or office — we'll get you back inside without the runaround.

services.title: Lock Installation
services.description: New locks, rekeying, and upgrades for better security and peace of mind.

services.title: Key Services
services.description: Cutting, duplication, and programming for all types of keys and fobs.

services.title: Security Upgrades
services.description: Deadbolts, smart locks, and commercial security systems that actually work.

about.heading: Springfield's lock and key team
about.body: We're Springfield locksmiths who show up when we say we will. One call gets you real help, not a phone tree.

cta.heading: Locked out or need better security?
cta.body: Don't wait around — we're already loaded up and ready to roll. Call now for immediate help.
